# hyli-wallet-cli

> Wallet management for the Hyli blockchain. Create accounts, fund them, transfer tokens, and sign messages.

## Quick start

```bash
npm install -g hyli-wallet-cli

# Create a wallet
hyli-wallet register alice vip

# Fund it
hyli-wallet fund 1000 oranj alice

# Transfer tokens
hyli-wallet send 200 oranj bob@wallet alice

# Check balance
hyli-wallet info alice
```

## Commands

```
hyli-wallet register <username> <inviteCode> [--contracts <c1,c2,...>]
hyli-wallet fund [amount] [currency] [walletName]
hyli-wallet send <amount> <token> <destination> [walletName]
hyli-wallet info [walletName]
hyli-wallet list
hyli-wallet default <name>
hyli-wallet sign <message> [walletName] [--sha3]
hyli-wallet pubkey [walletName] [--uncompressed]
```

## Signing for external services (e.g. hyliquid)

```bash
# Get public key (uncompressed for hyliquid)
hyli-wallet pubkey alice --uncompressed

# Sign with sha3-256 (hyliquid format)
hyli-wallet sign "alice@wallet:0:create_order:order123" alice --sha3
```

## Environment variables

- `NODE_BASE_URL` — Node URL (default: http://localhost:4321)
- `INDEXER_BASE_URL` — Indexer URL (default: http://localhost:4322)
- `WALLET_API_BASE_URL` — Wallet API URL (default: http://localhost:4000)
- `HYLI_WALLET` — Default wallet name override

Wallets stored at `~/.hyli/wallets/<name>.json`.

For full documentation, see llms-full.txt.
